request.body: {"input":[{"role":"user","content":"What are the key benefits of using renewable energy?"}],"model":"openai/gpt-oss-120b","instructions":"Provide a clear, structured response with main points.","store":false,"stream":false,"user":"1_1"}

response.body:
{"id":"resp_01kg4vkvwyfm4sje9tq3gj427q","object":"response","status":"completed","created_at":1769689706,"output":[{"type":"reasoning","id":"resp_01kg4vkvwyfm5ae99cam74ybv2","status":"completed","content":[{"type":"reasoning_text","text":"The user asks: "What are the key benefits of using renewable energy?" We need to give a clear, structured response with main points. So we can list benefits: environmental, economic, energy security, health, job creation, technological innovation, decentralization, etc. Provide bullet points or headings. The developer says "Provide a clear, structured response with main points." So we comply. No disallowed content. Provide answer."}],"summary":[]},{"type":"message","id":"msg_01kg4vkvwyfm5sfwgp0d72xws0","status":"completed","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"**Key Benefits of Using Renewable Energy** | Category | Main Benefits | Why It Matters | |----------|--------------|----------------| | **Environmental** | • **Reduces greenhouse‑gas emissions** – little to no CO₂, CH₄, or N₂O released.
• **Cuts air‑ and water‑pollution** – no combustion by‑products, less acid rain, fewer toxins.
• **Preserves ecosystems** – lower habitat disruption and minimal waste (e.g., no mining tailings). | Helps mitigate climate change, protects biodiversity, and improves overall planetary health. | | **Economic** | • **Lower long‑term operating costs** – “fuel” (sun, wind, water) is free; maintenance costs are predictable.
• **Price stability** – less exposure to volatile fossil‑fuel markets.
• **Job creation** – manufacturing, installation, operation, and maintenance of renewable assets generate new employment.
• **Stimulates local economies** – projects often source labor and materials locally. | Provides economic resilience, reduces energy‑price shocks, and drives sustainable growth. | | **Energy Security & Reliability** | • **Diversifies the energy mix** – reduces dependence on imported fossil fuels.
• **Domestic resource utilization** – each region can tap its own solar, wind, hydro, etc.
• **Resilience to supply disruptions** – decentralized generation can keep critical services running during grid outages. | Enhances national security and ensures a more reliable power supply. | | **Health & Social Welfare** | • **Improved public health** – fewer respiratory and cardiovascular illnesses from reduced air pollution.
• **Reduced healthcare costs** – lower disease burden translates to savings for societies. | Directly benefits community well‑being and reduces the economic burden of illness. | | **Technological Innovation** | • **Advances in storage, smart grids, and efficiency** – renewable integration spurs R&D in batteries, demand‑response, and digital controls.
• **Scalable solutions** – modular systems (rooftop solar, micro‑hydro) can be sized to meet any demand. | Drives broader technological progress that can be applied across sectors. | | **Climate & Policy Alignment** | • **Meets international commitments** – supports targets like the Paris Agreement and net‑zero pledges.
• **Eligibility for incentives** – tax credits, feed‑in tariffs, and green financing often favor renewables. | Aligns national strategies with global climate goals and unlocks funding opportunities. | | **Social Equity** | • **Energy access for remote or underserved areas** – off‑grid renewables bring electricity to communities without costly transmission lines.
• **Reduced energy poverty** – lower electricity bills over time. | Promotes inclusive development and bridges the energy divide. | ### Bottom‑Line Takeaway Renewable energy delivers a **multi‑dimensional advantage**: it protects the planet, strengthens economies, enhances health and security, fuels innovation, and supports social equity. Together, these benefits make it a cornerstone of a sustainable, resilient future.","annotations":[],"logprobs":null}]}],"previous_response_id":null,"model":"openai/gpt-oss-120b","reasoning":{"effort":"medium"},"max_output_tokens":null,"instructions":"Provide a clear, structured response with main points.","text":{"format":{"type":"text"}},"tools":[],"tool_choice":"auto","truncation":"disabled","metadata":{},"groq":null,"temperature":1,"top_p":1,"user":"1_1","service_tier":"default","background":false,"error":null,"incomplete_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":94,"input_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":0},"output_tokens":736,"output_tokens_details":{"reasoning_tokens":87},"total_tokens":830},"parallel_tool_calls":true,"store":false,"top_logprobs":null,"max_tool_calls":null}
